message:
docs(beads): enrich all 38 replay beads with specific deliverables, tests, and e2e scripts

Every implementation bead (T1.3-T6.8) now has:
- Concrete struct/trait/module deliverables with field-level specs
- Unit test requirements (>=30 per module) with specific test cases
- E2E test script paths with scenario descriptions
- Structured JSON logging requirements per test taxonomy
- User impact: pain removed, measurable outcome, no-regression guarantee
- Proptest property references (P-01 through P-20 from taxonomy)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
